title: ATMOS
subtitle: A journey through the sky

cards.label: ALTITUDE
cards.description: The glider soars silently at 3,000 feet, carried only by rising warm air currents.

cards.label: SPEED
cards.description: Average cruising speed of 50 knots. Slow enough to feel every breeze.

cards.label: SILENCE
cards.description: No engine. Only the sound of wind against the wings and your own breath.

cards.label: FREEDOM
cards.description: Three hours of flight. No destination, just the journey and the sky.

steps.endMessage: Some journeys don't need a destination. Just the sky, the wind, and the courage to soar.

dailyMessages: Every flight begins with a single glide.
